data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior regarding quiet hours for SMS notifications. However, the evidence provided does not include any simulation or validation of this specific behavior, leading to an inconclusive status. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the booking process and adversary actions, which do not address the expected outcome of the persona scenario.
gaps: No evidence of simulation or validation of the custom reminder schedule behavior.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
